title: Epigram - To John I Owed Great Obligation
content:
To John I owed great obligation,
But John unhappily thought fit
To publish it to all the nation:
Sure John and I are more than quit.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Matthew Prior, titled "Epigram - To John I Owed Great Obligation", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
